mapper.select:
SELECT pl.id, pl.line_code, pl.line_name, pl.workshop_id, pl.capacity_per_day, pl.status, pl.created_at, pl.updated_at FROM production_line pl WHERE pl.is_delete = 0
AND pl.line_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{lineName}, '%')
AND pl.workshop_id = #{workshopId}
ORDER BY pl.created_at DESC

SELECT pl.id, pl.line_code, pl.line_name, pl.workshop_id, pl.capacity_per_day, pl.status, pl.created_at, pl.updated_at, ws.id AS stationId, ws.station_code, ws.station_name, ws.line_id, ws.station_type, ws.status AS stationStatus, ws.created_at AS stationCreated_at, ws.updated_at AS stationUpdated_at FROM production_line pl LEFT JOIN workstation ws ON pl.id = ws.line_id AND ws.is_delete = 0 WHERE pl.id = #{id} AND pl.is_delete = 0 ORDER BY ws.station_code ASC
SELECT pl.id, pl.line_code, pl.line_name, pl.workshop_id FROM production_line pl WHERE pl.is_delete = 0 ORDER BY pl.line_code ASC
